caption: Table 131. Tolerance of form and position definitions
rows: The profile tolerance controls the location and orientation of the sides of the package.
The parallelism tolerance controls the orientation of the top surface of the package with respect to the seating plane, datum C.
The profile tolerance controls the location of the crowns of the balls with respect to datum C (coplanarity).
The tolerance of position that controls the location of the pattern of balls with respect to datum's A and B.
The tolerance of position that controls the location of the balls within the matrix with respect to each other.
